description_long: This is a modern flat-screen television with a large, rectangular display and a very slim profile. The front is dominated by a black, glossy screen surrounded by a thin, dark bezel, giving it a sleek and minimalist appearance. The television is supported by a central, four-pronged stand that provides stability and elevates the screen slightly above the surface. The back of the television is smooth and unadorned, with no visible ports or buttons, maintaining a clean and streamlined look. The side views highlight the ultra-thin depth of the device, emphasizing its contemporary design. This television would typically be found in living rooms, offices, or public urban spaces such as waiting areas or lobbies.
description: A large, slim flat-screen television with a thin bezel and a central four-pronged stand, featuring a glossy black display and minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the expansive black screen and thin bezel, with the central stand visible below.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the ultra-thin profile and the cross-shaped stand extending from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a smooth, featureless back panel and the central stand attachment.
description_view_3: Opposite side view again highlighting the television's slimness and the stand's structure.
attribute_bezel_design: Thin, black, plastic bezel with a minimalist and modern appearance.
